questions.text: Which typically contributes the largest volume of pollution to big Indian rivers?
options: Untreated sewage from homes and cities
questions.explanation: In many Indian rivers, untreated sewage is the largest source by volume.

questions.text: What does DO stand for in water quality testing?
questions.explanation: Dissolved Oxygen measures how much oxygen is available for aquatic life.

questions.text: Which is a major reason rivers get polluted near cities?
questions.explanation: Storm drains carry city waste directly into rivers during rains.

questions.text: What is the main goal of river cleaning projects?
questions.explanation: Cleaning aims to restore water quality, biodiversity, and uses for communities.

questions.text: Which technology helps track river pollution in real-time?
questions.explanation: Satellites and sensors provide data on water quality from space and ground.
